purpose: prove the Chiron core: exact MDL invariant recovery, held-out verification, refusal, certification, and bounded agency in one file

human_view.purpose: prove the Chiron core: exact MDL invariant recovery, held-out verification, refusal, certification, and bounded agency in one file
human_view.what_was_discovered: All 12 Chiron core gates pass: exact collapse recovers and verifies generators on held-out terms, refuses the incompressible, and the president escalates unsafe actions by construction.
human_view.why_believed: 12/12 core gates passed (CHIRON GREEN) in exact arithmetic with no network in the core path.
human_view.what_would_falsify: Any core gate failing — a false-verify, a missed escalation, or exec-of-string in the core path — would break the claim.
